# Weekly Review Template

Use this template for weekly reviews. Fill it out at the end of each week to assess progress and plan the next week.

---

## Weekly Review - Week [X]

### Week Information
- **Week**: [Week Number] of [Month Number]
- **Dates**: [Start Date] to [End Date]
- **Month**: [Month 1/2/3]
- **PIP Phase**: [Backend & Frontend Foundation / Advanced Features / Microservices]

---

5. [ ] [Goal 5]

### Actual Accomplishments

2. ✅ [What you actually completed]
3. ✅ [What you actually completed]
4. ⏳ [What's partially done]
5. ❌ [What didn't get done]

### Completion Rate
- **Planned**: [X] goals
- **Completed**: [Y] goals
- **Completion Rate**: [Y/X]% or [Y] out of [X]

## Code Quality Metrics

### Test Coverage
- **New Tests Written**: [X] tests
- **Test Coverage**: [X]% (if measured)
- **Tests Passing**: [X]/[Y]

### Code Quality
- **PSR-12 Compliance**: ✅/❌
- **Type Hints**: ✅/❌ (all methods typed)
- **Documentation**: ✅/❌ (PHPDoc complete)
- **Code Review**: ✅/❌ (reviewed and improved)

### Security
- **Authentication**: ✅/❌ (implemented correctly)
- **Authorization**: ✅/❌ (policies/gates used)
- **Input Validation**: ✅/❌ (all inputs validated)
- **SQL Injection Prevention**: ✅/❌ (using Eloquent)

### Performance
- **N+1 Queries Fixed**: [X] instances
- **Eager Loading Used**: ✅/❌
- **Indexes Added**: [X] indexes
- **Caching Implemented**: ✅/❌
